title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
desc: Inspector Karan seeks justice for his brother Arjun's murder. But Deepak, an actor, complicates things by shadowing him to add realism to his role.

title: Daud
desc: Nandu, a petty thief, is tasked with smuggling a mysterious packet. With police chasing him, he must escape and deliver it on time, risking everything for survival.

title: Yuvraaj
desc: After Deven and Danny learn their late father left all his wealth to their brother Gyanesh, who has special needs, they plot a way to take control of the inheritance.

title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
desc: Kanhaiya, an adult film actor in Thailand, falls for Shalu. To win over her traditional father, he fakes a respectable family with help from his quirky co-stars.

title: Akhanda
desc: When the nefarious Varadarajulu targets Murali Krishna, a devoted follower of Lord Shiva, Akhanda steps in and goes to any extent to defeat the evil.

title: Code Name: Tiranga
desc: An undercover agent sets out to avenge the 2001 terrorist attacks on Indian soil, but her pursuit of justice soon leads her to a dangerous point of no return.

title: Lost
desc: After a plane crash, the survivors find themselves stranded on a mysterious island. As they struggle to stay alive, they must unite when they discover they are not alone.

title: Phool Aur Kante
desc: Ajay, the son of a crime boss, lives peacefully until rivals kidnap his father. Forced into the underworld, he must confront danger and fight to save his family.

title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
desc: Suraj, an eligible bachelor, faces repeated rejections from prospective brides' families, only to discover that a wedding detective, Madhu Mangal Rane, is secretly behind his misfortunes.

title: Jis Desh Mein Ganga Rehta Hain
desc: Ganga, an innocent man raised by a foster couple in a village, is taken back to his real family in the city, where he struggles to adjust to modern life and its ways.

title: Karthik Calling Karthik
desc: Karthik, a shy introvert plagued by setbacks and a mocking boss, receives a mysterious call from a stranger-offering him a chance to change his life forever.

title: Mard Ko Dard Nahi Hota
desc: Surya has a rare condition that prevents him from feeling pain. Determined to turn it into strength, he learns martial arts and sets out to help his biggest idol.

title: Commando 2 - The Black Money Trail
desc: A four-member team embarks on a covert mission to capture Vicky Chaddha, a money launderer in Malaysia. Their plan falters when one member is shot, complicating everything dangerously.

title: Udta Punjab
desc: A rock star, labourer, doctor, and cop struggle with a drug crisis in Punjab. Their lives intertwine as they fight addiction and chaos.

title: Ghoomer
desc: Anina, a young cricket star, loses her right hand before her debut. With help from a failed cricketer and creative training, she becomes a bowler and invents a new style.

title: Lingaa
desc: Lingaa, a small-time thief, changes his ways after learning how his grandfather built a dam to help villagers. Inspired, he fights corruption to save the dam and protect their future.

title: Pure Bollywood
desc: Bollywood songs - catchy, emotional, and upbeat - dominate the charts. From heartbreak to celebration, these tracks capture every mood, making people dance, cry, and sing along everywhere.
